title: Amenemhat II
body: Amenemhat II, also known as Amenemhet II (died c. 1895 BC), was the third king of the 12th Dynasty during the Middle Kingdom of Egypt. Amenemhat II ruled for about 35 years, but his reign and family relationships remain relatively obscure.
categories: Pharaohs of the Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt
